proposal_summary: The Rari Foundation proposes to integrate Arbitrum One with the open-source Rarible Protocol (including an indexer, orderbook, and SDK) to jumpstart NFT ecosystem growth on Arbitrum, requesting 127,351 ARB from the DAO.

disclosed_entities.name: RARI Foundation
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The Rari Foundation is submitting a proposal to jumpstart the growth in the Arbitrum NFT ecosystem.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: As such, the Arbitrum DAO has an opportunity to express its willingness to incentivize ecosystem growth

disclosed_entities.name: Rarible Inc.
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Rarible Inc.: A leading NFT marketplace that allows users to mint, buy, and sell NFTs.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Payment of 127,351 ARB to Rari Foundation for integration costs
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Integration of Arbitrum One into Rarible Protocol and API
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The 100,000 USD amount is payable in ARB under the exchange rate on the day of the proposal submission. As of Sept 13, the rate is 1 ARB = $0.785339, which translates to 127,351 ARB.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires a standard transfer of ARB tokens, along with technical efforts to integrate indexing, APIs, orderbooks, and deploying specific Rarible contracts to Arbitrum.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Tasks: Integration of Arbitrum One chain into Rarible Protocol... Contract Deployment: The Rarible Shared NFT, Rarible Factory (for creating collections), and Rarible ExchangeV2 contracts will be deployed to Arbitrum

limitations: No destination address is provided for the ARB transfer in this text.
